task: #src/agent.rs run_tui currently calculates input and output tokens and shows it to the user, can we configure this to work with actual cost also? So essentially we need to know which how much the users configured model costs in #src/config.rs #src/tui/config_view.rs

steps.instruction:
Add `cost_per_mtok_output: Option<f64>` field to struct Profile at src/config.rs:~30 and struct ResolvedConfig at src/config.rs:~185, next to the existing cost_per_mtok_input field

[index: `ResolvedConfig` at line 206 in src/config.rs]

steps.description: Add cost_per_mtok_input to AgentConfig and propagate to AppState
steps.instruction:
Add `cost_per_mtok_input: Option<f64>` field to AgentConfig at src/agent.rs:~493 (after git_context). Then in run_tui at src/agent.rs:~106-456, pass this value when creating AppState at the location where other config fields like profile, model, context_tokens are passed

steps.description: Update stats_view to use output cost field if available
steps.instruction:
Modify src/tui/stats_view.rs:56-69 (cost_str function) to accept an optional separate output cost parameter, and update calls at lines 191, 220, 250, 266 to pass both input and output cost values from state.cost_per_mtok_input and state.cost_per_mtok_output

steps.description: Add cost fields to config view for user editing
steps.instruction: Add input fields for cost_per_mtok_input and cost_per_mtok_output in the profile configuration view at src/tui/config_view.rs, similar to how context_tokens is displayed and edited
